Off Calendar Aug-11-2005 Text Ruling

MOTION To Dismiss Pursuant To Ccp 583.410 & 583.420

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mary M. Sackett, Esq., the Goldman Law Firm, 415-435-5500, for moving party William Ellis
